errors.message:
Rule parse error in rule csharp-path-traversal-io-sinks:
 Invalid pattern for C#: Stdlib.Parsing.Parse_error
----- pattern -----
(Open|OpenRead|OpenWrite|ReadAll.*|WriteAll.*|Create|Delete|Move|Copy|Exists)
----- end pattern -----
